prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 云南大学在北京市近年录取最低位次约在11000-12000名区间波动，2025年基准位次约11300名左右，整体呈小幅后移趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜约第80-90名，属于中后段211院校；云南大学作为西南地区综合性大学，近年声誉平稳，抖音关注度一般，未见明显投档断档记录；民族学A+、生态学A-等优势学科对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关专业社会热度平稳；北京市考生总数近年基本稳定在5-6万人区间；云南大学位于昆明，距北京较远，地域偏好对北京考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势及地域因素，在2025年基准位次基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约11500名，区间11000-12000名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲民族学等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Yunnan University's minimum admission rankings in Beijing in recent years have fluctuated around 11,000-12,000, with a baseline ranking of approximately 11,300 in 2025, showing a slight overall downward trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking around 80-90 on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the middle-to-lower tier of 211 institutions; as a comprehensive university in Southwest China, Yunnan University has maintained a stable reputation in recent years, with average attention on Douyin and no significant records of admission gaps; its advantageous disciplines such as Ethnology (A+) and Ecology (A-) have some appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of related majors is stable; the total number of Beijing examinees has remained roughly between 50,000 and 60,000 in recent years; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, far from Beijing, and geographical preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Beijing examinees' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the fluctuation trend of historical rankings and geographical factors, competition is expected to intensify slightly from the 2025 baseline ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11,500, with a range of 11,000-12,000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can prioritize top-tier majors such as Ethnology.
